prestazioni: Engine swap to a **M119 E60 AMG** (5.0L V8, 381 HP) with a **Hahn Racecraft** billet crankshaft, **Mahle Motorsport** forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and **ARP Custom Age 625+** head studs for 12mm deck reinforcement. Pair with a **Garrett GT4202** turbo (0.96 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate for 650 HP on **VP Racing Q16** fuel with a **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system.

Full **KW Suspensions Clubsport** coilover kit (3-way adjustable, 800 lb/in front springs, 600 lb/in rear) with **Eibach 28mm front / 25mm rear anti-roll bars** and **Meyle HD** subframe bushings. Install **Brembo GT 6-piston 380mm front / 4-piston 355mm rear** big brake kit with **Ferodo DS2500** pads and **ATE Type 200** brake fluid.

Drivetrain upgrade with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2.8:1 final drive) in a **Getrag 280/03** 6-speed manual conversion (using **G-Force GSR** bellhousing adapter) paired with a **Spec Stage 4+** twin-disc clutch and **Peloquin** differential cover. Replace halfshafts with **GKN Driveline** CV joints and **UUC Motorwerks** stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 W124** widebody kit (120mm front / 140mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber** front splitter and **Voltex Type-3** rear diffuser. Paint in **Mercedes-Benz Classic Signal Red (DB 568)** with **3M Matte Black** roof and **BBS RS-GT II** 18x9.5 ET15 (front) / 18x11 ET20 (rear) wheels wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** (245/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear).

**Recaro SRD-E** front seats (retrimmed in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts**) and **Sparco Pro 2000** rear seats, both mounted on **Corbeau FX1** bolt-in harness bars. Replace interior trim with **Zirwes** carbon fiber dashboard, **Vintage Air Gen-IV** climate control, and **Alpine iLX-F509** 9-inch touchscreen with **MB Quart** 1200W amplifier and **Focal Utopia Be** speakers.

**Hella Micro DE** LED headlights with **Morimoto XB35** projectors and **Lux H8 V4** angel eyes. Install **Gintani** carbon fiber hood (with **AEM X-Series** wideband gauge pod) and **OEM+** rear spoiler (W124 500E AMG-style). Full **PPG Concept Clear** paint correction with **Gyeon Ceramic Coating** for UV protection.
